hero.headline: Uttaranchal University Online MBA in Information Technology: Fees, Syllabus and Career Scope
hero.sub: UGC-DEB approved online MBA with Information Technology specialisation from Uttaranchal University, Dehradun. NAAC A+, WES recognised, est. 2011. Rs 1,40,000 gross, Rs 98,000 net (semester) or Rs 94,000 net (one-time) after 30% Early Bird. No-cost EMI at Rs 3,956/month. IT Fundamentals, Business Intelligence, ERP, and Web Design in Sem 3-4.

sections.tldr: Uttaranchal University Online MBA Information Technology: NAAC A+, UGC-DEB approved, WES recognised. Rs 94,000 net (one-time) or Rs 98,000 net (semester) after 30% Early Bird on Rs 1,40,000 gross. No-cost EMI at Rs 3,956/month. Sem 3-4 covers Fundamentals of Information Technology, Business Intelligence and Analytics, Enterprise Resource Planning, and Web Designing and Content Management. Budget IT management MBA for professionals moving from technical to managerial roles.

about.body:
The Uttaranchal University Online MBA in Information Technology is offered by Uttaranchal University (UU), a private university established in 2011 in Dehradun, Uttarakhand. UU holds NAAC A+ accreditation and UGC-DEB approval for its online programmes. The degree is WES recognised.

The Information Technology specialisation covers Fundamentals of Information Technology, Business Intelligence and Analytics, Enterprise Resource Planning, and Web Designing and Content Management across Semesters 3 and 4. The curriculum is designed for IT professionals transitioning to management roles, covering both tech fundamentals and business applications of IT.

At Rs 94,000 net (one-time), this is among the cheapest NAAC A+ online MBAs with an IT track. The trade-off is that the IT syllabus leans toward traditional IT management (ERP, web design) rather than modern data science or AI. For professionals who need the MBA credential to move from technical to managerial roles at their current organisation, UU IT is a cost-effective path.

sem3Subjects.name: Strategic Management
sem3Subjects.description: Develop competitive strategy frameworks, industry analysis models, and corporate-level strategic planning skills.

sem3Subjects.name: Supply Chain Management
sem3Subjects.description: Study procurement, logistics, inventory management, and end-to-end supply chain coordination.

sem3Subjects.name: Financial Statement Analysis
sem3Subjects.description: Interpret balance sheets, income statements, cash flow statements, and apply ratio analysis for decision-making.

sem3Subjects.name: Fundamentals of Information Technology
sem3Subjects.description: Cover IT infrastructure, networking basics, database concepts, operating systems, and technology management foundations.

sem3Subjects.name: Business Intelligence and Analytics
sem3Subjects.description: Apply BI tools, data warehousing concepts, dashboard design, and analytics-driven decision-making in business contexts.

sem4Subjects.name: Entrepreneurship Development
sem4Subjects.description: Study business model creation, startup finance, venture capital, and entrepreneurial risk assessment.

sem4Subjects.name: Corporate Governance
sem4Subjects.description: Examine board structures, regulatory compliance, SEBI guidelines, and ethical governance frameworks.

sem4Subjects.name: Project Work
sem4Subjects.description: Complete an applied research project on an IT management topic with data collection, analysis, and presentation.

sem4Subjects.name: Enterprise Resource Planning
sem4Subjects.description: Study ERP system architecture, SAP/Oracle module concepts, implementation lifecycle, and change management for ERP rollouts.

sem4Subjects.name: Web Designing and Content Management
sem4Subjects.description: Cover web design principles, CMS platforms, UX basics, and digital content strategy for business applications.

syllabus.note: Sem 1-2 cover shared core subjects across all Uttaranchal University Online MBA specialisations. See the main Uttaranchal University Online MBA page for the core subject list.

whoHires.body:
Information Technology MBA graduates target these industries and roles:

**Industries:** IT services and consulting, Software product companies, BFSI (technology divisions), Manufacturing (IT and ERP teams), E-commerce and digital platforms

**Entry-level roles:** IT Analyst, Business Analyst, ERP Functional Consultant, BI Analyst, Technology Project Coordinator

**Mid-level roles (3-5 years):** IT Manager, Project Manager, ERP Manager, BI and Analytics Manager, Technology Operations Manager

**Senior roles (7+ years):** CTO, CIO, VP Technology, Head of IT Operations, Director of Digital Transformation

**Typical hiring organisations:** TCS, Infosys, Wipro, HCL Technologies, Cognizant, Tech Mahindra, IBM India, Accenture, Capgemini, SAP India, Oracle India, Deloitte, KPMG, Reliance Jio, HDFC Bank (IT division)

skills.body:
The Information Technology specialisation builds skills for IT management and tech-business bridge roles:

**Technical skills:**
- Business Intelligence and Analytics: BI tool proficiency, data warehouse concepts, KPI dashboard design, and analytics-driven reporting for management
- Enterprise Resource Planning: ERP system architecture, module configuration concepts, implementation lifecycle management, and vendor evaluation
- IT Fundamentals: networking, database management, IT infrastructure planning, and technology stack evaluation for non-technical managers
- Web Design and CMS: web development basics, CMS platform management, UX principles, and digital presence management

**Applied skills:**
- IT Project Management: scope definition, resource planning, risk assessment, and stakeholder communication for technology projects
- Digital Strategy: technology roadmap development, IT budget planning, and vendor management for IT procurement

**Soft skills:** Translating technical requirements for business stakeholders, managing cross-functional IT project teams, presenting technology investment proposals to leadership, and coordinating between development teams and business units.

comparisons.body:
Comparing Uttaranchal University Online MBA Information Technology against peers:

**vs IGNOU MBA (Rs 66,000):** IGNOU does not offer a dedicated IT specialisation in the same structure. UU at Rs 94,000 provides four IT-specific subjects. For IT management depth at affordable cost, UU has an edge.

**vs Galgotias Online MBA (Rs 86,400):** Galgotias does not list Information Technology as a standalone specialisation with the same depth. UU offers BI, ERP, and web design as dedicated subjects. Fee difference is under Rs 8,000.

**vs Amity Online MBA IT (Rs 2,25,000):** Amity is 2.4x the cost with NIRF #22 and stronger brand in IT hiring. For technology management roles at IT majors, Amity IT carries more recognition. UU delivers NAAC A+ at under Rs 1 lakh.

**vs LPU Online MBA IT (Rs 1,61,000):** LPU offers NIRF #31, Coursera Plus, and stronger tech company connections. At 1.7x the cost, LPU is a more complete package for IT management careers.

**vs CU Online MBA (Rs 1,65,000):** CU is NIRF #19 with PwC co-teaching modules. At 1.75x the cost, CU offers substantially better brand and industry integration.

**vs JIIT Online MBA (Rs 1,82,000):** JIIT offers mandatory internship and AI-integrated core. At nearly 2x the cost, JIIT is specifically stronger for tech-forward IT management roles with its AI curriculum.

**vs DPU Online MBA (Rs 1,89,400):** DPU is NIRF #41, NAAC A++. At 2x the cost, DPU offers higher accreditation and stronger Pune IT ecosystem connections.

fees.body:
The Uttaranchal University Online MBA in Information Technology has a gross fee of Rs 1,40,000. A 30% Early Bird discount reduces the net fee across all payment tracks.

**Track 1: One-Time Payment**
- Net fee: Rs 94,000 (includes Rs 4,000 additional concession over semester track)
- Single payment at admission

**Track 2: Annual Payment**
- Rs 47,000 x 2 years = Rs 94,000 net
- Same net cost as one-time payment

**Track 3: Semester Payment**
- Rs 24,500 x 4 semesters = Rs 98,000 net
- Costs Rs 4,000 more than one-time or annual tracks

**No-Cost EMI:**
- Rs 3,956/month directly through the university
- No interest charged. No processing fee.

**Included:** Exam fee of Rs 2,500 per semester is included in all quoted figures.
**Not applicable:** No separate application fee. No scholarships beyond the Early Bird discount. No bundled perks.

Fees listed are indicative. EdifyEdu reconfirms fees with Uttaranchal University each quarter. Please reconfirm with our counsellor before any payment.

certificate.body: The degree certificate is issued by Uttaranchal University, Dehradun. It reads 'Master of Business Administration' with the Information Technology specialisation noted on the marksheet and transcript. Online mode is identified per UGC-DEB 2020 regulations. The degree is WES recognised for international credential evaluation. It is valid for corporate hiring, PSU eligibility, and higher education admission across India.

reviews.intro: Three reviews from Uttaranchal University Online MBA Information Technology students. Ratings from post-completion feedback.

items.name: Saurabh
items.liked: ERP and Business Intelligence subjects were directly useful for my role as an IT team lead at a manufacturing company. The Rs 94,000 fee is genuinely affordable.
items.disliked: The IT syllabus leans traditional. No dedicated AI, machine learning, or cloud computing subjects. If you want cutting-edge tech MBA, look elsewhere.
items.body: I needed the MBA to move from a technical lead role to IT management. UU delivered the credential at a price that did not require a loan. The ERP subject helped me lead our SAP implementation more effectively. For traditional IT management roles, the programme is sufficient. For tech-forward roles at product companies, the syllabus will feel dated.

items.name: Pooja
items.liked: Business Intelligence and Analytics was the strongest subject. No-cost EMI at Rs 3,956/month fit my budget as a mid-level IT professional.
items.disliked: Brand recognition at Noida IT companies is limited. My manager did not recognise UU. The NAAC A+ tag helped during the internal promotion conversation.
items.body: I work at an IT services company and needed the MBA for a project manager promotion. UU IT served that purpose at minimum cost. I would not recommend this for someone trying to break into product management at a startup or MNC. For internal promotions at mid-size IT firms, NAAC A+ at Rs 94,000 is practical.

items.name: Ravi
items.liked: Web Designing and Content Management was unexpectedly useful for managing our company website redesign. Exam fees included in the quoted fee, which was transparent.
items.disliked: No Coursera Plus, no Azure/AWS certifications, no tool access bundled with the programme. You are on your own for tech certifications.
items.body: Best value for money if you already work in IT and just need the management degree. The programme will not teach you new technologies, but it will give you the management frameworks and MBA credential. At Rs 94,000 with NAAC A+, no complaints about the fee. The brand is the main limitation.

faqs.question: Does UU Online MBA IT cover AI or machine learning?
faqs.answer: No. The IT specialisation covers traditional IT management subjects: IT Fundamentals, Business Intelligence, ERP, and Web Design. It does not include dedicated AI, machine learning, or cloud computing subjects.

faqs.question: What is the net fee for UU Online MBA Information Technology?
faqs.answer: The gross fee is Rs 1,40,000. After the 30% Early Bird discount, the net fee is Rs 94,000 (one-time or annual) or Rs 98,000 (semester track). The semester track costs Rs 4,000 more.

faqs.question: Is this MBA suitable for software developers moving to management?
faqs.answer: Yes, for traditional IT management roles like IT Manager, Project Manager, or ERP Manager. For product management roles at tech startups or MNCs, the syllabus may be too traditional. Consider LPU or JIIT for tech-forward IT management tracks.

faqs.question: Does UU bundle any tech certifications with the IT MBA?
faqs.answer: No. UU does not bundle AWS, Azure, Google Cloud, or any platform certifications. You will need to obtain tech certifications independently.

faqs.question: Is the degree valid for government IT roles?
faqs.answer: Yes. The programme is UGC-DEB approved. The degree is valid for government job applications, PSU recruitment, and higher education admission across India.

chooseIf: You want a NAAC A+, UGC-DEB approved online MBA in Information Technology at under Rs 1 lakh total fee.
You are an IT professional moving to management and need the MBA credential at minimum cost.
You want no-cost EMI at Rs 3,956/month with exam fees included and no hidden charges.
consider: If you want AI, ML, or cloud computing in the MBA curriculum, JIIT at Rs 1.82L offers AI-integrated core with mandatory internship.
If you want bundled tech certifications or Coursera Plus, LPU at Rs 1.61L (NIRF #31) is a stronger package.
If brand recognition at IT majors matters, Amity at Rs 2.25L (NIRF #22) or CU at Rs 1.65L (NIRF #19) carry stronger weight.
